title: Bus Driver
notes: Works perfectly both in DirectX and OpenGL modes. You can enable 1080p support by editing the file called specs.settings in the installation folder

title: Bus Driver
notes: The game is starting, I can hear the main menu music, but the screen stays black. It's strange because it works in vanilla WINE. Also, it's an OpenGL game...

title: Bus Driver
notes: Steam Overlay doesn't work correctly as there is no mouse

It is highly recommendable to run first the setup applet (Just select Configure Bus Driver option once click on Play), and then select DirectX Mode, not forgetting to choose your native screen resolution from the list.
Once done, all settings are update, and the game will run without great issues.
title: Bus Driver

notes: Use first the Setup Tool to set the screen resolution, and check the active GPU first. The game runs fine with an Intel GPU, if you reduce the resolution to improve performance. To use the NVidia card on switchable graphics laptops, use optirun %command% on startup shortcut to use the high performance GPU instead.
